title: ED dizziness documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Lists cardiac, neurologic, trauma, intoxication, visual, consciousness, and severe-headache concerns.
red_flags.rationale: The exact red-flag section supports recording vital data, appearance and time-critical symptoms only when assessed.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists cardiac, neurologic, trauma, intoxication, visual, consciousness, and severe-headache concerns.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Dizziness

red_flags.text: Identifies emergency and specialist referral features for dizziness.
red_flags.rationale: The exact referral section supports documenting escalation, specialist discussion or follow-up only when clinician-decided or arranged.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Identifies emergency and specialist referral features for dizziness.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Dizziness

examination.text: Specifies symptom description, timing, triggers, concurrent symptoms, age, and pre-existing conditions.
examination.rationale: The exact DHA dizziness history section supports onset, duration, severity or impact, associated symptoms, relevant negatives and clinician risk context without inferring a vestibular, cardiovascular or neurological cause.
examination.evidence_extract: Specifies symptom description, timing, triggers, concurrent symptoms, age, and pre-existing conditions.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Dizziness

examination.text: States that tests depend on history and examination and should be documented only when clinically deemed necessary.
examination.rationale: The exact investigation section supports recording existing test or imaging status only when already performed or reviewed.
examination.evidence_extract: States that tests depend on history and examination and should be documented only when clinically deemed necessary.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Dizziness

examination.text: Emphasises structured history and available examination to distinguish dizziness syndromes.
examination.rationale: The virtual clinical-assessment recommendation was reviewed; no bedside test or diagnosis is auto-selected.
examination.evidence_extract: Emphasises structured history and available examination to distinguish dizziness syndromes.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Dizziness

source_limitations: Symptom phenotype, triggers, gait, hearing, neurological symptoms, orthostatic data, examination, ECG, glucose, pregnancy, diagnosis, treatment and disposition remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
